title: On A Fart - Let In The House Of Commons
content:
Reader, I was born, and cried;
I crack'd, I smelt, and so I died.
Like Julius Caesar's was my death,
Who in the senate lost his breath.
Much alike entomb'd does lie
The noble Romulus and I:
And when I died, like Flora fair,
I left the commonwealth my heir.
meaning:
Matthew Prior's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On A Fart - Let In The House Of Commons"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
